2253310.name: Aimlabs+ Premium Membership
2253310.description:
Aimlabs+ Premium Membership

Get an edge over your competition with Aimlabs+!

Our premium membership gives you access to unique and exclusive training features designed to optimize your personal training.

Brand New features:

  • Aimlabs Training Programs - A New Progression System: A guided experience to help you get better at the games you love most! 

  • Mouselabs - Sens Finder 2.0: The best new way to find and refine your sensitivity. No more tweaking or endless guessing to find your sensitivty. The Sensitivity Finder will work in the background to help you perfect your aim!

Other Features

  • AI Aim Coach: Let our AI be your aim coach and help you identify your weakness!

  • Adaptive Tasks: Train smarter as Aimlabs adapts to your optimal difficulty level in real time. Works with any task!

  • Members Only Chat: Be part of the community, ask questions, get answers or just chat with fellow aimers!

  • VALORANT Training Center: Gain access to exclusive training modes, 1:1 map recreations, and premium performance metrics for VALORANT!

  • Aimlabs Academy: Learn from pros and master your favorite shooter in no time through plans that provide a fusion of tasks, videos, and articles!

  • 50% off all Aim Credit purchases

  • Premium Battlepasses: Receive access to all of our Premium Battlepass tiers!
2253310.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 俄语, 简体中文, 泰语, 繁体中文, 土耳其语

price_overview.recurring_sub_desc: 今日需支付 ¥ 42.00，另外自动续订每 1 个月需支付 ¥ 42.00。
